'''âw-w-b-k''' ('''kawawbekoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:velocitize|velocitize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-w-b-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:velocitize|velocitize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âw-w-b-k
|-
! Lemma
| kawawbekoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thiwawbekoko|thiwawbekoko]] || [[word:jiwawbekoko|jiwawbekoko]] || [[word:shiwawbekoko|shiwawbekoko]] || [[word:kiwawbekoko|kiwawbekoko]]
|-

|-

|-
